criteria.criterion: An outbound emission test is parametrized over all 6 relations: the 3 mapped ones assert the exact (type, swap) tuple; the 3 unmapped ones assert an empty mutation list.
A REMOVE test covers outward-Blocks→depends_on (assert emitted mutation is {action: remove, relation: depends_on}).
The new cases assert per-relation ORIENTATION, not mere presence: the depends_on emission case asserts swap is True, and the applier case asserts the SWAPPED endpoint tuple.

citation.description: Only test files (test_link_dedup.py, test_link_removal_sync.py) are modified by this ticket. Production source files (outbound_links.py, outbound_differ.py, inbound_differ.py, link_direction.py) show no ticket-related modifications; all relation mappings and direction logic were pre-existing. No syntax or import issues visible in the test code.

criteria.criterion: make lint/make typecheck pass; no production source files change.
